source_string: Are you sure you want to quit?
This demo will last five game days, do your best!
translation: Dan demo se aħħar ħamest ijiem logħba. Tagħmel l-a ħjar tiegħek!

source_string: You have passed your fifth day, use F2 to save a screenshot of your creation
translation: Tkun għaddejt il-ħames jum tiegħek. Uża %s biex tissejvja screenshot tal-ħolqien tiegħek.

source_string: This demo will last 5 in-game days (about 1 hour and 40 minutes of real time). Check the achievements for hints! Have fun!
translation: Dan demo se jdum 5 jiem fil-log ħba (madwar 1 siegħa u 40 minuti ta ' ħin reali). Iċċekkja l-avvanzi għall-hints! ħu pjaċir!

source_string: Use %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s and the mouse to move around
The demo time has expired, buy the game to continue or start a new world!
translation: Il-ħin demo skada. Ixtri l-log ħba biex tkompli jew tibda dinja ġdida!

source_string: Are you sure you want to lock the difficulty of this world? This will set this world to always be %1$s, and you will never be able to change that again.
translation: Żgur tixtieq tissiġilla d-diffikulta' ta' din id-dinja? Jekk tagħmel dan, id-dinja tiġi ssettjata biex tkun %1$s għal dejjem, u qatt ma tkun tista' terġa' tibdel id-diffikulta'.

translation: Is-servers tal-awtentikazzjoni bħalissa mhumiex aċċessibbli. Jekk jogħġbok erġa pprova.
